Off Calendar Aug-04-2014 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Application For Default Judgment
Off Calendar Jul-08-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Harry M. Dorfman, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Mitch Lyon, #6848

Howard Olsen, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, DAVID SOLIS.
No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) NABIL ALMATARI, individually and dba VIP TRANSPORTATION LIMO.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered Defendants Does 1-15 dismissed without prejudice.
Plaintiff David Solis sworn and examinded on behalf of Plaintiff.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows: The court stated the terms of the Judgment on the record. See Scanned document.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To Aug-20-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
